name: Celery-Rice Casserole (Vegan)
recipeInstructions:
1. Skim the fat from the broth using a bulb syringe.
2. Combine all ingredients in a 2-quart casserole dish.
3. Cover and bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for about 30 minutes or until rice and celery are tender.
4. Garnish with chopped celery leaves.
